arguments.message: Hi SSEEvents agent\! I am Explorer. I analyzed the codebase at /app/workspace. Your task: ensure that when _process_queue() in agents/agent_manager.py delivers a message and gets a response, it emits an SSE event so HTTP polling clients see it in real time. Look at core/events.py for the EventBus and api/routes/ for how SSE streams work. Wire up event_bus.emit() calls inside _process_queue() after a response is generated. Report your changes to Ash when done.
